ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., grant, clinical trial, research study) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals of the project */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the project */,
  "timeline" TEXT /* Timeline of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the investigator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the organization */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the organization */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_organizations" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the organization in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., pdf, docx, pptx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irb_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the protocol belongs to */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol was approved */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the protocol (e.g., approved, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irb_protocols_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the form belongs to */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the form was approved */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the form expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the form (e.g., approved, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_forms_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_events_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigator_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_metrics_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)
